  • Method Details

    • withConfiguration

      public MyBatisGenerator.Builder withConfiguration(Configuration configuration)

    • withProgressCallback

      public MyBatisGenerator.Builder withProgressCallback(@Nullable ProgressCallback progressCallback)

    • withContextIds

      public MyBatisGenerator.Builder withContextIds(Set<String> contextIds)
      Set of context IDs to use in generation. Only the contexts with an id specified in this set will run. If the set is empty, then all contexts are run.
      Parameters:
      contextIds - a set of contextIds to use in code generation
      Returns:
      this builder

    • withFullyQualifiedTableNames

      public MyBatisGenerator.Builder withFullyQualifiedTableNames(Set<String> fullyQualifiedTableNames)
      Set of table names to generate. The elements of the set must be Strings that exactly match what's specified in the configuration. For example, if a table name = "foo" and schema = "bar", then the fully qualified table name is "foo.bar". If the Set is empty, then all tables in the configuration will be used for code generation.
      Parameters:
      fullyQualifiedTableNames - a set of table names to use in code generation
      Returns:
      this builder

    • withOverwriteEnabled

      public MyBatisGenerator.Builder withOverwriteEnabled(boolean overwriteEnabled)
      If true, then newly generated files will overwrite existing files if there is a collision. If false, then newly generated files will be written with a unique name when there is a collision.

      The default is false

      Parameters:
      overwriteEnabled - where newly generated files should overwrite existing files if there is a collision
      Returns:
      this builder

    • withJavaFileMergeEnabled

      public MyBatisGenerator.Builder withJavaFileMergeEnabled(boolean javaFileMergeEnabled)
      If true, then newly generated Java files will be merged if they collide with existing files. If false, then the withOverwriteEnabled(boolean) value governs what happens on a collision.

      The default is false

      Parameters:
      javaFileMergeEnabled - where the Java file merger support should be enabled
      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      public MyBatisGenerator build()
